reasoning.thought: MONITOR: WMT260320P00120000 RAPID_MOVE - LLM: CLOSE [EXECUTED]: Short put is moving against the position — up 14.18% from entry with price making new intraday highs. VIX at 31.18 in a choppy, risk-off environment (Iran war headlines) creates continued upward pressure on put premiums; no stop was set, so closing now limits further loss before momentum accelerates.

MONITOR: INTC260320P00040000 RAPID_MOVE - LLM: WATCH: Short put position is losing as INTC moves against you with no stop set — this is the priority concern. VIX at 31.4 and choppy market increase whipsaw risk; establish a stop immediately at $1.25 to cap further loss while monitoring.

MONITOR: INTC260320P00040000 NEW_LOW - LLM: HOLD: Short put position is slightly against entry at -1.85% with current price at $1.10, well below the $1.25 stop. VIX at 31.4 and choppy market supports elevated put premiums, but loss is minimal and stop provides adequate protection.

MONITOR: INTC260320P00040000 RAPID_MOVE - LLM: HOLD: Short put position is only -2.78% against a $1.25 stop, well within normal options volatility especially with VIX at 30.43. Price remains below the stop and the move is minor.

MONITOR: INTC260320P00040000 NEW_LOW - LLM: HOLD: Short put position is profitable at +2.78% with price moving in our favor (hitting new intraday lows). Thesis intact — INTC weakness continues. Stop at $1.25 provides adequate protection above entry.

MONITOR: INTC260320P00040000 ENTRY_THRESHOLD - LLM: HOLD: Short put position is profitable (+5.56%, $12) with INTC moving in our favor. New intraday low confirms bearish price action supporting the thesis. Stop at $1.25 provides adequate protection.

agentLog.action: LLM: Oil spiking 9.3% to ~$100/barrel is the dominant macro catalyst today — geopolitical shock driving stagflation fears, with all futures risk-off (SPY -0.97%, RUT -1.77%). Energy is the only clear sector beneficiary; growth/tech names face headwinds from elevated VIX (26-29) and choppy regime. V9 Q1 consensus picks (MU, XOM, SLB, GILD, CAT) are the highest-conviction longs in this environment.
